distribution_policy.reason: The full feature table is 77MB and is better handled as a reproducible local artifact or shared-drive file rather than a Cloudflare static asset.

sources.name: Seoul public-transit OD by administrative dong
sources.used_for: Movement-demand proxy target and offline validation features
sources.availability_note: Published after the fact; not a live feature.

sources.name: TOPIS traffic information
sources.used_for: Traffic volume proxy, road speed, congestion and supply proxy

sources.name: Seoul realtime citydata
sources.used_for: Realtime place population, road congestion and weather context

sources.name: Seoul living population
sources.used_for: Offline demographic context and full observed model
sources.availability_note: Published after the fact; excluded from live-compatible model.

sources.name: KMA ASOS hourly weather and nowcast
sources.used_for: Temperature, precipitation, humidity, wind, pressure, snow and live weather override

sources.name: Korean public holidays
sources.provider: Korea Astronomy and Space Science Institute / data.go.kr

sources.name: OpenStreetMap and Seoul spatial features
sources.used_for: Roads, buildings, transit infrastructure and static POI features
sources.availability_note: Static features are refreshed manually or by data rebuild.

artifacts.name: Feature-set evaluation
artifacts.purpose: Compare full observed, live-compatible and baseline scores

artifacts.name: Latest traffic forecast
artifacts.purpose: Next-hour dong-level traffic volume proxy, congestion and speed estimates

artifacts.name: Traffic forecast comparison
artifacts.purpose: Compare predicted road congestion/speed with later citydata observations

artifacts.name: Population pressure summary
artifacts.purpose: Aggregate Seoul citydata POI population forecasts into dong-level living/floating population pressure proxy

artifacts.name: Demand guardrail summary
artifacts.purpose: Rank dong-level monitoring priority with confidence guardrails from demand, traffic, population and validation signals

artifacts.name: Model observability
artifacts.purpose: Summarize feature importance, live validation logs, 2026 proxy validation and baseline readiness
